name: africa-cdc-helpdesk
description: Root scripts mirroring finance/ — orchestrate Laravel API + Vue SPA

scripts.install:all: cd backend && composer install && cd ../frontend && npm install --cache ./.npm-cache --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -c "#119a48,#0d7a3a" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" --names=api,web
